title: Certara MCP capability fragment
description: Contract a provider package ships at inst/mcp/capabilities.json. The Certara.R MCP host merges these fragments into certara_mcp_capabilities(): rules concatenate (provider wins on duplicate id), session_start and prerequisites concatenate, and the host picks the first non-null primary_guidance_entry.

rules.description: Agent-behavior rules contributed by this provider.

id.description: Stable rule id. A duplicate id from a provider overrides the host's generic rule of the same id.

primary_guidance_entry.description: KB entry id the agent should read first for this provider's domain.

workflows.description: Optional task-phase overlay specific to this provider's domain.

session_start.description: Instructions the agent should run at session start.

prerequisites.description: Runtime/licensing prerequisites for this provider's tools.
